query: SELECT rarity, tier, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT slot) as slots FROM game_equipment_catalog GROUP BY rarity, tier ORDER BY FIELD(rarity,'common','uncommon','rare','epic','legendary'), tier;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT rarity, tier, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT slot) as slots FROM game_equipment_catalog GROUP BY rarity, tier ORDER BY FIELD(rarity,'common','uncommon','rare','epic','legendary'), tier;
